title: Fermented Gooey Romantic Uruguayan White Fish Stir-fry
description: This unique dish features a blend of fermented white fish blended with gooey textures and served as a romantic stir-fry that is both authentic and nutritious.
instructions: Blanch the white fish fillets in boiling water for about 5 minutes.
In a wok or large frying pan, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat.
Add minced ginger and garlic to the pan and sauté until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add soy sauce and fermented black beans to the pan, stir well for another minute.
Fold in the blanched white fish fillets gently with a spatula.
Drizzle rice vinegar over the fish and flip occasionally till fully heated through, about 3-5 minutes.
Serve hot garnished with chopped scallions.
